composio_raw.name: Jira
composio_raw.description: A tool for bug tracking, issue tracking, and agile project management.

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive project management and issue tracking platform for agile software development teams.
llm_raw.notes: Jira provides an extensive REST API for issue management, workflow automation, and project administration, widely supported by existing agentic frameworks.
